sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38035" key="e)panablasta/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπανα-βλαστάνω</orth>, <sense id="n38035.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grow upon,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.198.30</biblScope></bibl>, Sch.Dsc.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.362</biblScope> </bibl> Matth.</sense> </entryFree>
